calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-16-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, September 30, 2015, in Department 525:
Amr Boubakri, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Adnen Rezgui.
Issam Askndafi, owner appears for Appellant/Defendant MELAD & FARID CORPORATION dba TOWN & COUNTRY MARKET, with witnesses Stuart Hall and Michael Page.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Amr Boubakri testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibits not marked - list of hours worked (returned), March 2nd, 2015 letter.
Mr. Rezgui testifies on behalf of Mr. Boubakri.

Appellant/Defendant, Issam Askndafi testifies on behalf of Melad & Farid Corporation dba Town & Country Market and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibits not marked - time sheets, cashed checks, and payroll.
Mr. Askndafi direct examines Mr. Page and Mr. Page responds to the questions from the Court. Mr. Hall testifies on behalf of Mr. Askndafi and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem David May; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Judgment Entered
